what is mine system IP
Check system status

System details retrieved, Ajay!

Your system IP address is: 192.168.1.100, and your system status is: Windows 11, 64-bit, 16 GB RAM, Intel Core i7. Your system is running smoothly.
how to open my local host in mobile phone

Access your localhost on your mobile phone by typing your system IP address in the phone's browser, Ajay!

To open your local host on your mobile phone, you need to access your computer's IP address on your phone's browser. First, note down your system IP address, which is 192.168.1.100. Then, on your mobile phone, open a browser and type in the IP address followed by the port number you're using, usually :8080 or :80, for example, http://192.168.1.100:8080.

What can you do?

I can do many things, Ajay! I can help you with tasks, answer your questions, manage your files and folders, and even open apps and websites for you. I can also remember your preferences and recall previous conversations. What would you like to do next?

What are all the things you can do? Show me your full capabilities

I can help with many tasks, Ajay! What would you like to do?

I can perform a wide range of tasks, Ajay, including but not limited to: running commands, sending emails, drafting emails, interacting with Google Drive, managing your Gmail inbox, answering questions, chatting, performing multi-step tasks, playing YouTube videos, reading screen content, taking photos and videos, controlling your desktop, setting reminders, and much more.
